title: Sword Blocking Mechanics Compat
description: Uses the minecraft:swords tag to add modded support to Fuzs' Sword Blocking Mechanics. Includes RPG Series, Simply Swords, Aquamirae.
body:
> **Requirements**  
> - [Sword Blocking Mechanics (client and server)](https://modrinth.com/mod/sword-blocking-mechanics)  
> - OPTIONAL (Recommended) - [LMFT Server-side](https://modrinth.com/mod/lmft)
> 
> *Optionally:* Set `disableIngameError` to `true` in `config/lmft.json`

## About

Adds **vast mod support** to Sword Blocking Mechanics. The base mod supports Vanilla swords and some mods that properly configure their weapons. This datapack applies fixes for those that don't.

> **Note**: The method used in this datapack adds items to the `minecraft:swords` item tag, which may also resolve incompatibilities with other mods.

## Supported Mods

- [Basic Weapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/basicweapons)
- [Death Knights (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/death-knights)
- [Knaves' Needs](https://modrinth.com/mod/knaves-needs)
- [Simply Swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords)
- [Archers (RPG Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/archers)
- [Aquamirae](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquamirae)
- [Hybrid Aquatic](https://modrinth.com/mod/hybrid-aquatic)
- [Toasty Weapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/toasty-weapons)
